headline: RAMageddon Arrives: AI’s Endless Appetite Just Killed the PC Comeback
summary: The global PC market has clawed its way back from a brutal slump in 2022 and 2023, when shipments cratered amid post-pandemic oversupply, with 2024 delivering modest growth as businesses and consumers began refreshing aging fleets. By 2025, the rebound appeared to be accelerating sharply — shipments rose 9.3% year-over-year, fueled by commercial upgrades to ...
